headline: Opus Genetics Touts Retinal Gene Therapy Pipeline, September BEST1 Data Catalyst
summary: Opus Genetics (NASDAQ:IRD) is advancing a portfolio of gene therapies for inherited retinal diseases, with two programs already in the clinic and three more expected to enter clinical testing within the next 12 months, President Dr. Ben Yerxa said during a fireside chat at RBC Capital Markets’ 2026
